description: Tests serialisation of a named type definition that is a generic map with its own methods.

assertions.description: The 'MyMap' type should be a type definition, not an alias.
The underlying type string for 'MyMap' should be the generic map.
The 'MyMap' type should have its generic type parameters K and V serialised.
The 'Get' method must be present on the 'MyMap' type.
The 'Get' method's signature must correctly use the generic type parameters.
